layers.source_title: US DOI Bureau of Land Management Geospatial Business Platform

columns.name: ALLOT_NO
columns.description: The number that identifies an Allotment which is unique within the BLM administrative state.

columns.name: ALLOT_NAME
columns.description: The name by which the allotment is commonly known.

columns.name: GIS_ACRES
columns.description: This is a calculated value of area in units of acres based on the area field created by default within the ESRI Polygon data structure.

columns.name: ADMIN_ST
columns.description: An administrative unit that identifies the state or geographic area which has administrative jurisdiction over lands, and cases.

columns.name: ADM_OFC_CD
columns.description: BLM administrative office (which is subordinate to the state office) that has jurisdiction and/or management authority over lands within a geographic area.

columns.name: ADM_UNIT_CD
columns.description: The BLM administrative unit/office that is a combination of Administrative State Code and Administrative Office Code that fully identifies the geographic area which has jurisdiction over the lands.

columns.name: ST_ALLOT
columns.description: This is a concatenation of two existing attributes but is not a substitute for having either of those two attributes.  It is the existing unique code that allows identification of individual allotments throughout the entire United States.

columns.name: ACTIVE_DT
columns.description: The calendar date on which the boundary of an allotment is established and becomes effective.  The format for the date will be MM/DD/YYYY, and will be entered only once for that polygon.

layers.source_title: US DOI Bureau of Land Management Geospatial Business Platform

columns.name: ALLOT_NO
columns.description: The number that identifies an Allotment which is unique within the BLM administrative state.

columns.name: ALLOT_NAME
columns.description: The name by which the allotment is commonly known.

columns.name: PAST_NO
columns.description: The number that identifies a specific pasture within one Allotment.

columns.name: PAST_NAME
columns.description: A pasture name is given to an area that is a subset area of an allotment.

columns.name: GIS_ACRES
columns.description: This is a calculated value of area in units of acres based on the area field created by default within the ESRI Polygon data structure.

columns.name: ADMIN_ST
columns.description: An administrative unit that identifies the state or geographic area which has administrative jurisdiction over lands, and cases.

columns.name: ADM_OFC_CD
columns.description: BLM administrative office (which is subordinate to the state office) that has jurisdiction and/or management authority over lands within a geographic area.

columns.name: ADM_UNIT_CD
columns.description: The BLM administrative unit/office that is a combination of Administrative State Code and Administrative Office Code that fully identifies the geographic area which has jurisdiction over the lands.

columns.name: ST_ALLOT_PAST
columns.description: This is a concatenation of three existing attributes (ADMIN_ST + ALLOT_NO + PAST_NO) but is not a substitute for having any of those three attributes.

columns.name: ST_ALLOT_PAST_NAME
columns.description: Minimum concatenation of ADMIN_ST, ALLOT_NAME, and PAST_NAME across all rows sharing the same ST_ALLOT_PAST value. Added in Riverscapes processing.

columns.name: ST_ALLOT_PAST_MULTI
columns.description: 1 if the ST_ALLOT_PAST entity appears on more than one row, 0 otherwise. Added in Riverscapes processing.

columns.name: RS_ROW_ID
columns.description: Deterministic UUID5 derived from GlobalID using the Riverscapes OID namespace (_RS_ROW_ID_NAMESPACE). Unique per row. Added in Riverscapes processing.

columns.name: geometry
columns.description: Pasture Polygon geometry

columns.name: geometry_bbox
columns.description: Used for improved spatial query performance. Added in Riverscapes processing.

layers.layer_name: BLM Grazing Pastures for NM Bootheel
layers.source_title: US DOI Bureau of Land Management National Operations Center Staff

columns.name: Pasture_ID
columns.description: Unique ID for pasture

columns.name: geometry
columns.description: Pasture Multi-Polygon geometry

columns.name: geometry_bbox
columns.description: Used for improved spatial query performance. Added in Riverscapes processing.
